restaurants.name: The Shakespeare Pub
restaurants.ambience: British pub helmed by an Indian chef

restaurants.name: Tandoor Indian Restaurant
restaurants.ambience: Casual Indian Restaurant

restaurants.name: DAWAT
restaurants.ambience: Cozy, full-service Indian restaurant with friendly, attentive staff. Relaxed and welcoming atmosphere

restaurants.name: U Rybaka Cholpon Ata
restaurants.ambience: Lakeside café with straightforward, relaxed vibe

restaurants.name: Barashek Cholpon Ata
restaurants.ambience: Cozy café on Sovetskaya Street popular for its pleasant atmosphere

restaurants.name: Tsentr Otdykha Raduga
restaurants.ambience: Resort-style dining with lake views

restaurants.name: Amrita Vegetarian Cafe
restaurants.ambience: Cozy, peaceful vegetarian café with a light, spiritual vibe
highlights: Prepares fresh, satvik (onion/garlic-free) dishes to order

restaurants.name: Govinda's Vegetarian Cafe
restaurants.ambience: Hare Krishna-style café

restaurants.name: Spice Mantra
restaurants.ambience: Mix of Indian/Thai/Chinese cuisines with South‑Indian brunch specials

restaurants.name: Paul
restaurants.ambience: Cosy mountain café right at the top station. Wooden interiors, candlelit ambiance, and panoramic views
must_try_dishes: Hot soups (e.g., French onion or creamy vegetable)
Hot soups (French onion or creamy vegetable)

restaurants.name: Syn32
restaurants.ambience: Yurt-style pop-up cafés or tents at mid-station—informal, rustic, and alpine-themed

restaurants.name: Namaste Indian Restaurant
restaurants.ambience: Cozy and authentically decorated, with warm lighting and attentive service. Homemade feel with owner and chef personally engaging with guests
highlights: Owner and chef personally engage with guests

restaurants.name: Magic Masala
restaurants.ambience: Cozy, relaxed restaurant with friendly staff and authentic Delhi-style décor

restaurants.name: Silver Spoon
restaurants.ambience: Modern, peaceful ambiance with Hindi-speaking staff and meticulous attention to flavor
highlights: Rated as one of the finest Indian venues in town

restaurants.name: Narsharab
restaurants.ambience: Elegant, spacious restaurant with warm Azerbaijani-inspired decor. Features live music and dance

restaurants.name: Lukum Turkish Cuisine
restaurants.ambience: Modern, comfortable Turkish restaurant with indoor seating and outdoor table options—family-friendly and relaxed

restaurants.name: Tsekh
restaurants.ambience: Trendy multi-cuisine bistro/pub offering indoor and outdoor seating, with a wide selection of beers and small plates. Casual, social atmosphere

restaurants.name: Eastern Gate Indian Restaurant
restaurants.ambience: A highly rated restaurant serving authentic Indian cuisine, popular among travelers looking for familiar flavors
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Namo Indian Restaurant
restaurants.ambience: Warm and inviting, run by Chef-Owner Mr. Vijay (ex-Taj India Hotel). Combines North and South Indian flavors in a cozy, contemporary space
highlights: Best South-Indian cuisine in the city

restaurants.name: Jump-in-Goat Coffee
restaurants.ambience: A highly rated specialty coffee shop known for quality beans and excellent brewing techniques
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Bowler Coffee Roasters
restaurants.ambience: A popular specialty coffee shop known for its high-quality beans and minimalist interior
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Big Apple Coffee Shop
restaurants.ambience: A relaxed café located near the city center, offering a good selection of coffee, pastries, and light café-style dishes
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Darejani
restaurants.ambience: A well-known Georgian restaurant popular for its rich flavors, hearty dishes, and welcoming ambiance
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Noodles
restaurants.ambience: A stylish restaurant located inside Kazakhstan Hotel, offering a mix of Asian and international dishes
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Tarkhun National Cuisine
restaurants.ambience: A welcoming restaurant that focuses on classic regional recipes prepared with fresh local ingredients, offering travelers a chance to experience the rich culinary traditions of Kazakhstan
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Namaste Kolsai
restaurants.ambience: A simple and welcoming eatery located near Kolsai Lake, offering a comfortable stop amidst nature
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Sandyq Restaurant
restaurants.ambience: A popular restaurant specializing in traditional Kazakh cuisine with a refined presentation and cultural ambiance
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Restaurant "Khoroshiy God"
restaurants.ambience: A trendy restaurant with a modern atmosphere offering European and fusion cuisine. It's well-known for creative dishes and stylish interiors
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Vahtanguri Georgian Restaurant
restaurants.hours: Monday – Thursday: 12:00 PM – 1:00 AM, Friday – Saturday: 12:00 PM – 2:00 AM
restaurants.ambience: A lively Georgian restaurant known for hearty dishes and a vibrant dining atmosphere
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Cream Cafe & Terrace
restaurants.ambience: A stylish terrace café with views of the surrounding greenery, making it a pleasant stop before or after visiting Kok-Tobe Hill
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Vanilla Handmade Coffee
restaurants.ambience: A popular specialty coffee café known for high-quality roasted beans and minimalist café interiors
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Big Apple Coffee Терренкур
restaurants.ambience: A cozy coffee stand located along the Terrenkur walking trail, a popular scenic promenade in Almaty
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Beefeater Dostyk
restaurants.hours: Monday – Thursday: 12:00 PM – 12:00 AM, Friday – Saturday: 12:00 PM – 1:00 AM
restaurants.ambience: A well-known steakhouse offering premium grilled meats and European dishes in a stylish setting
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: Tyubeteyka
restaurants.ambience: A traditional Central Asian restaurant with beautiful interior décor inspired by Silk Road culture
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

restaurants.name: U Afanasicha
restaurants.hours: Monday – Friday: 10:00 AM – 2:00 AM, Saturday – Sunday: 9:00 AM – 2:00 AM
restaurants.ambience: A lively restaurant and pub popular with locals for hearty food and a wide selection of drinks
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

attractions.name: Park of 28 Panfilov Guardsmen
attractions.description: A beautiful, serene park in the city center

attractions.name: Zenkov Cathedral (Ascension Cathedral)
attractions.description: A stunning wooden Russian Orthodox cathedral located within Panfilov Park, known for its vibrant colors and unique architecture

attractions.name: Dostyk Avenue
attractions.description: Iconic avenue showcasing Almaty's evolution from Soviet-era city to contemporary metropolis

attractions.name: Issyk Lake
attractions.description: Stunning mountain lake known for its turquoise waters and serene surroundings

attractions.name: Abay Kazakh State Academic Opera and Ballet Theater
attractions.description: Cultural venue for opera and ballet performances
attractions.hours: 10:00 AM to 2:00 PM, and again from 3:00 PM to 6:00 PM

attractions.name: Arbat Street
attractions.description: Vibrant street featuring local artisans, street performers, and quaint shops

attractions.name: Medeu
attractions.description: World's highest Olympic-sized speed skating rink with picturesque mountain backdrop

attractions.name: Shymbulak Mountain Resort
attractions.description: Mountain resort offering fresh mountain air, magnificent panoramic views, and cafes with views

attractions.name: Kok Tobe Hill
attractions.description: A scenic hill located on the edge of the city offering some of the best panoramic views of Almaty
attractions.entry_fee: 3,500 tenge for a one-way trip and 6,000 tenge for a round trip per person
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

attractions.name: Green Bazaar (Zelyony Bazaar)
attractions.description: Bustling indoor market offering vibrant sensory experience with fresh produce, spices, local delicacies, and souvenirs

attractions.name: Central State Museum of Kazakhstan
attractions.description: One of Kazakhstan's largest and oldest museums, offering a deep dive into the country's rich history and cultural heritage

attractions.name: First President's Park
attractions.description: Serene expanse honoring Nursultan Nazarbayev, set against the breathtaking Alatau Mountains

attractions.name: Almaty International Airport (ALA)
attractions.description: Main international airport serving Almaty

attractions.name: Republic Square
attractions.description: One of the most important public squares in Kazakhstan, Republic Square is home to the impressive Independence Monument
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

attractions.name: Panfilov Park
attractions.description: This beautiful green park is dedicated to the Panfilov soldiers, heroes of World War II. It is one of Almaty's most beloved public parks
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

attractions.name: Zenkov Cathedral
attractions.description: One of the world's tallest wooden buildings, remarkable for its intricate architecture and vibrant colors

attractions.name: Kok Tobe Hill Gondola Cableway
attractions.description: Cable car offering panoramic views of Almaty and the surrounding mountains

attractions.name: Big Almaty Lake
attractions.description: Turquoise lake surrounded by snow-capped mountains
attractions.hours: Best to visit between 9 AM and 5 PM

attractions.name: Tamgaly Tas Petroglyphs
attractions.description: Open-air UNESCO-listed rock art site on the Ili River

attractions.name: Gorky Park
attractions.description: Green heart of Almaty for relaxation

attractions.name: Dostyk Plaza
attractions.description: Luxury shopping mall offering international brands and designer boutiques

attractions.name: Mega Mall
attractions.description: Shopping mall featuring diverse selection of stores alongside entertainment options

attractions.name: Esentai Mall
attractions.description: High-end shopping mall with exclusive brands, gourmet dining, and panoramic city skyline views

attractions.name: Abay Metro Station
attractions.description: One of the most beautifully designed stations on the Almaty Metro. Each station in Almaty is uniquely themed and decorated, reflecting Kazakhstan's culture, history, and artistic traditions
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

attractions.name: Ascension Cathedral
attractions.description: Located inside Panfilov Park, the Ascension Cathedral is one of the most beautiful landmarks in Almaty. Built entirely of wood in 1907, one of the tallest wooden buildings in the world
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

attractions.name: Green Bazaar
attractions.description: One of the most famous markets in Kazakhstan, Green Bazaar is a vibrant and colorful marketplace where locals shop for fresh produce, spices, dried fruits, meats, and traditional snacks
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

attractions.name: Charyn Canyon
attractions.description: Often called the "Grand Canyon of Central Asia," Charyn Canyon stretches over 150 kilometers and features dramatic red sandstone formations
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

attractions.name: Lower Kolsai Lake
attractions.description: Often referred to as the "Pearls of the Tian Shan," the Kolsai Lakes are a series of crystal-clear alpine lakes surrounded by pine forests and dramatic mountain peaks
source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

hotels.name: Hotel Kazakhstan
hotels._source_file: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx

local_dishes.name: Baursak
local_dishes.description: Fried dough balls (like savory donuts); delicious with jam or tea

local_dishes.name: Kuurdak (veg version)
local_dishes.description: Can be made with potatoes and onions

local_dishes.name: Plov (veg)
local_dishes.description: Rice pilaf with carrots and sometimes chickpeas; ask for 'no meat'

local_dishes.name: Lagman (veg)
local_dishes.description: Hand-pulled noodles in a broth with vegetables (request without meat)

local_dishes.name: Manti (veg)
local_dishes.description: Dumplings, usually with meat, but Korean or Uyghur places offer veg versions (pumpkin, potato)

local_dishes.name: Beshbarmak (veg)
local_dishes.description: Rare, but some restaurants serve vegetarian versions with noodles and mushrooms

transport_options.description: Use official taxis or ride apps like Yandex Go or inDrive
Cable car to Shymbulak Mountain Resort and Kok Tobe Hill
transport_options.cost: 3,500 tenge one-way, 6,000 tenge round trip to Kok Tobe

source_files: Almaty Kazakhstan/Uzbekistan and Kazhakstan- All Inclusive Guide_13032026.docx
